title: Modelling protocol for the Urban-PLUMBER model evaluation project
author: Mathew Lipson
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Instructions for participants of the Urban-PLUMBER evaluation project for modelling in urban areas. 

 This protocol sets out: 

 
	 background and scope of the Urban-PLUMBER project 
	 expected project outputs 
	 experiments to be undertaken 
	 format of provided data (forcing and site description) 
	 format of requested model output 
 

 For further project information see  https://urban-plumber.github.io/
